summary: Applied three surgical seam-polish edits to tighten adjacency continuity: reinforced the Chapter 15 dawn-call handoff at entry, clarified why the noon Coney meeting framing reads as logistics rather than ambush, and foreshadowed the line-switch that supports Chapter 17's prepaid-number opening.
edits: Added an early line linking wake arrival to the dawn call wave from the prior chapter seam.
Added a sentence after the family-thread text to align with the next chapter's 'noon looked practical' legal framing.
Adjusted the closing line to foreshadow shutting down Marisol's current phone number before morning.
